title: Deeve
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image=[[File:Deeve.png]] |name=Deeve |homeworld=[[Arporatal-Lanin]]''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' |birth= |death= |species=[[Arpor-Lan]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]{{WEGCite|story=A Typical Survey|book=Galaxy Guide 8: Scouts}} |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] **[[Task Force on Alliance Security]] *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[Bureau of Scouting and Exploration Services]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Never get used to seeing things like this. What a marvelous view, and I'm the first person to have ever seen it.|Deeve|}} '''Deeve''' was an [[Arpor-Lan]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] who served the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Using skills he had learned on his [[Homeworld/Legends|native planet]] [[Arporatal-Lanin]], Deeve became one of the most respected scouts in the Alliance after scouting [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] and the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], as well as exploring the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Apliria]]—which later became a [[Safe world/Legends|safe world]]. After being promoted to the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], he helped to establish [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], and he also became a member of the [[Task Force on Alliance Security]]. After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Deeve became a scout for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Bureau of Scouting and Exploration Services]]. He traveled in the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[NRSS Founder|NRSS ''Founder'']] along with fellow scouts [[Jarsa]] and [[Effcee]] on a mission to survey the planets of eight [[Star system/Legends|star systems]], searching for a profitable [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] vein. The first four worlds they scouted lacked any interesting resources they could use, and Deeve found a [[Unidentified tentacled being|tentacled being]] while on the [[Unidentified planet (Deeve)|fifth one]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|NRSS ''Founder'', this is Deeve. I'm at the edge of the canyon, about five minutes ahead of schedule. Anything new I should be aware of?|Deeve|}} Deeve was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Arpor-Lan]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arporatal-Lanin]]. As a child, Deeve suffered from several apprehensions, including acrophobia. While he was able to overcame his fear of heights, he still retained other phobias as an adult. Deeve learned [[Scout/Legends|scouting]] and tracking skills on Arporatal-Lanin and became a scout. He later joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and helped to scout worlds in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] and the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], looking for potential Alliance [[Safe world/Legends|safe worlds]]. Deeve was a key part of the preliminary scouting of the planet [[Apliria]], which became a safe world. The Arpor-Lan was considered to be one of the best scouts in the Alliance. After being promoted to [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], Deeve also helped [[Support Services/Legends|Alliance Support Services]] establish [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]]. By [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. Deeve had become a member of the [[Task Force on Alliance Security]]. In that role, he wrote a report on the [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] independent scout [[Yurdak Fav]], mentioning that Fav was a potential threat to Rebel surveyors due to her penchant for following them during their reconnaissance missions. Deeve could not discover whether Fav had links with any enemy of the Alliance, but he knew she was not a member of the Alliance, and as a consequence she was compromising the Rebel safe worlds his colleagues were discovering. During his [[Time/Legends|time]] in the Alliance, Deeve also worked with [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Bakki Sourthol]], Lieutenants [[Anson Blazer]] and [[Tura Raftican]], and special [[Operative|agent]] [[Tay Vanis]]. After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' Deeve joined the [[Bureau of Scouting and Exploration Services]], also known as the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] Scout Service. While doing so, he worked alongside the female [[Jarsa]] and the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Effcee]]. Deeve disliked Effcee's warmhearted personality, and he vainly tried to [[Programmer/Legends|reprogram]] this trait off of her. The three of them were assigned the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[NRSS Founder|NRSS ''Founder'']] from the [[Outer Region Foxar Scout Base]], and were sent to survey planets in eight different [[Star system/Legends|star systems]], looking for valuable natural resources such as [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] veins. As long as they found at least one useful world, that discovery would cover their expenses and give them a profit on the mission. Once the survey was over, they intended to return to their starting point. The crew of the ''Founder'' discovered no valuable resources in the first four planets they scouted. The [[Unidentified planet (Deeve)|fifth planet]] had a hostile but breathable [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], and Deeve had to wear his protective gear before disembarking the ship to climb a mountain from which he could perform a more precise survey. After the climb, he contacted the crew of the ship and began the analysis with the help of his hovering droid [[REM-02]]. Cliffside, he encountered a [[Unidentified tentacled being|giant, tentacled being]]. Having nowhere to retreat, Deeve reacted by firing near it and calling the crew of the ship again, asking for reinforcements. ==Personality and traits== [[File:NRSSDeeve.png|thumb|right|Deeve, agent of NRSS]] {{Quote|Make sure she's back up there soon. If I call for help, get ''her'' to fly down here; I don't want you trying to land that thing. You'd end up burying the ''Founder'' in a mountain or something.''"
"''Honey, that makes me want to try. Just to prove you wrong—|Deeve and Effcee|}} Deeve was a respected scout in the Rebel Alliance and was known for his tracking skills. He disliked talking with the droid Effcee, whom he found to be annoyingly affectionate, preferring instead to converse with the organic Jarsa. He then tried to reprogram Effcee to make her less friendly, but his programming skills were not sufficient: he believed he had succeeded in changing the droid's behavior, but to his chagrin, Effcee kept her fondness. During his childhood, Deeve suffered from several fears; he overcame his apprehension of heights, but he retained other frights. As an adult, he was not frozen with fear when facing [[Alien/Legends|alien]] creatures he did not know: on at least one occasion, he reacted by shooting in front of a potentially hostile being. ==Equipment== When scouting for the New Republic, he carried specialized gear, including a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]], a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] attached to his waist with [[molecular hook]]s, a [[Breath mask/Legends|face breather]] with [[monitor pad]]s that were activated with his tongue, a [[spectrameter]], [[raddetect]]s, a [[mineral spotter]], and a [[temp monitor]], as well as the droid REM-02 in his [[Backpack/Legends|backpack]]. As REM-02 could not understand what it surveyed, Deeve made it contact an [[enviro-analyzer]] which could achieve conclusions. ==Behind the scenes== Deeve first appeared in "[[A Typical Survey]]," a two-page short story that served as an introduction to ''[[Galaxy Guide 8: Scouts]]''. ==Appearances== *{{WEGCite|story=A Typical Survey|book=Galaxy Guide 8: Scouts}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Alliance Intelligence members]] [[Category:Arpor-Lans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Scouts]] [[Category:Task Force on Alliance Security personnel]]
